user.title: Dell 7609WU Projector
user.description: Set up a Dell 7609WU projector by IP address. The username is fixed to 'administrator' by the projector firmware; only set a password if one is enabled in the projector's web management.

discovery_confirm.title: Dell 7609WU Projector found
discovery_confirm.description: Add the projector at {host}? If an admin password is enabled on the projector, enter it below (username is fixed to 'administrator').

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate projector
reauth_confirm.description: The projector at {host} rejected the stored admin password. Enter the current one (leave empty if the password was disabled).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure projector
reconfigure.description: Update the host or admin password for this projector.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the projector
error.invalid_auth: The projector rejected the admin password
error.not_supported: The device did not identify as a supported Dell web management interface

abort.not_supported: Device is not a supported Dell projector
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The device at this host is a different projector
